_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: MBBS with relevant experience and training
clinical_indications: First episode of an acute abscess
Provide immediate relief prior to scheduling an enucleation procedure

preauth.label: Detailed clinical notes with history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, indication for procedure and advice for admission
Complete blood count (CBC), Complete urine examination (CUE)
(Optional) If cyst was aspirated earlier, fluid for: culture & sensitivity, Gram staining
(Optional) MRI (in case of huge cyst to assess the extent)

claim.label: Culture & sensitivity report of aspirated fluid

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes – all vitals, detailed history, symptoms, signs, physical examination including local examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment, and advice for admission?
Did clinical examination ± imaging confirm the diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Was the clinical examination indicative of procedure?
Was Histopathology report for enucleated tissue / Culture & sensitivity report of aspirated fluid submitted?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Patient did not present with fever, foul smelling, or pus discharge from the cyst, despite drainage being claimed.
Patient did not present with fever (no pus discharge) with fluctuant tense tender swelling, despite drainage being claimed.
Mandatory clinical notes and admission details are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Diagnosis not confirmed by clinical examination or imaging at pre-authorization.
Culture and sensitivity report of aspirated fluid is missing or inadequate at claim submission.
Detailed operative/procedure notes are missing or incomplete at claim submission.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Facilities with well-equipped operation theatre with Anesthetist and Anesthesia facility
clinical_key_pointers: Clinical and histologic overlap with cysts found in the vulva and vagina, with common vulvar cysts including Bartholin's gland cysts, epidermal inclusion cysts, and mucous cysts of the vulva.
